name: vibe-stack-rules
description: Opinionated engineering rules and skills for Next.js + Supabase + shadcn/ui + Zustand projects.

plugins.name: claude-design-to-nextjs
plugins.description: Converts a Claude Design bundle (HTML + CSS + components, fetched from api.anthropic.com/v1/design/) into production-ready Next.js App Router code — TypeScript, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui — through a 5-phase pipeline with parallel analysis agents, a mandatory approval checkpoint, and a verification pass. Automatically layers the vibe-stack-rules contract when stack/*.md is detected at repo root.
